title: trigonanthera resediflora
intro: Trigonanthera resediflora is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Trigonanthera resediflora include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are typically dried and then used in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
